title: Verify every agent operation contract
preconditions: Published linux-x64 executable and embedded skills for Codex and Claude Code.
steps: Enumerate OperationDescriptors; invoke help and schema; exercise success and each declared expected-error class through JSON stdin; run compatibility mismatch cases; compare stdout, stderr, exits, and skill manifests.
expected: Every public operation has deterministic schema/help/compatibility metadata; one structured stdout object; metadata-only stderr; documented non-zero exits; incompatible skills fail before writes.
